nasb.text: The backslider in heart will have his fill of his own ways, But a good man will be satisfied with his.

esv.text: The backslider in heart will be filled with the fruit of his ways, and a good man will be filled with the fruit of his ways.

cnv.text: 心中背道的，必飽嘗自己行為的惡果； 善人也因自己所行的，得到善報。

ccb.text: 背弃正道，自食恶果； 善人行善，必得善报。

csbs.text: 心中背道的必饱尝他行为的恶果； 好人也必饱尝他行为的回报。
